summary: Connects a text input inside a selected page element to a callback so the callback receives the current value immediately and after user edits.
signature_intent: Accepts a DOM element identifier and a value-handling function.
behavior: Finds a page element by the provided identifier.
Finds the first descendant text input within that element.
Registers an input-event listener on that input.
On each input event, prevents the event default action and passes the input's current value to the provided handler.
Invokes the handler once during setup with the input's current value.
edge_cases: Throws if no element exists for the provided identifier.
Throws if the selected element does not contain an input.
The handler may be called with an empty string when the input has no value.
Only the first matching descendant input is observed.
